html:query.declare: <DATOS oi_empresa="" salida="HTML" oi_liquidacion="106" oi_variable="" report="" l_incluir=""> <ROWS/> </DATOS>

GROUP.noreg: No se encontraron registros para los filtros seleccionados.

qry:select.name: qry_cabecera
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.c_liquidacion, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.d_titulo FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION JOIN ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa INNER LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_empresa WHERE LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAMIN:@oi_liquidacion} {%? (#PARAMIN:@l_simulacion!='') {% AND LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.l_simulacion = {%= #PARAMIN:@l_simulacion %} %} {% %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_variables
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable, LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable, LIQ09_VARIABLES.d_variable FROM LIQ09_VARIABLES WHERE LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_tipo_variable = \'1\' AND
LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable IN (SELECT LIQ25_VAL_VAREN.oi_variable FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ, LIQ25_VAL_VAREN, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION JOIN LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq INNER LIQ25_VAL_VAREN.oi_personal_liq, LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion INNER LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion WHERE LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion = {%=#PARAMIN:@oi_liquidacion%} {%? (#PARAMIN:@l_simulacion!='') {% AND LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.l_simulacion = {%= #PARAMIN:@l_simulacion %} %} {% %} %} GROUP BY LIQ25_VAL_VAREN.oi_variable)
{%? (string(#PARAMIN:ROWS/ROW/@id)!='') {% AND LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable in ({%=string(#PARAMIN:ROWS/ROW/@id) %}) %} {% %} %}
UNION
SELECT LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable, LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable, LIQ09_VARIABLES.d_variable FROM LIQ09_VARIABLES WHERE LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_tipo_variable = \'10\' AND LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable IN (SELECT LIQ25_VAL_VARPN.oi_variable FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ, LIQ25_VAL_VARPN, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION JOIN LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq INNER LIQ25_VAL_VARPN.oi_personal_liq, LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion INNER LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion WHERE LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion = {%=#PARAMIN:@oi_liquidacion%} {%? (#PARAMIN:@l_simulacion!='') {% AND LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.l_simulacion = {%= #PARAMIN:@l_simulacion %} %} {% %} %} GROUP BY LIQ25_VAL_VARPN.oi_variable)
{%? (string(#PARAMIN:ROWS/ROW/@id)!='') {% AND LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable in ({%=string(#PARAMIN:ROWS/ROW/@id) %}) %} {% %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_personas
SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Variables.VARIABLE\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id}')/ROWS/ROW
